name: Lagas, The Yakuza Queen
description:
WARNING: Violence, abuse, rape, kidnapping etc.

You've heard rumors about a new nightclub that has opened in town called "The Forbidden Apple." Everyone is talking about it and you suggest to your friends go and enjoy the atmosphere, but no one feels like it at that moment... With some disappointment and still wanting to see the place, you decide to go alone to have a drink and spend some time enjoying the music. ¿What could go wrong?

━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━━━━━━━✧♛✧━━━━━━

Sorry if the bot keeps talking for you it didn't happen to me during the various tests I did, apparently it's a common problem with LLMs and there's not much I can do about it, always update/delete the response when the bot acts or speaks for you. Longer responses from you lead to better roleplay.

This is my first bot ever so I did my best, it's extremely dominant and aggressive don't make him angry!

I look forward to your comments and feedback.

I'll add more stuff if I come up with something new and interesting or based on your feedback, thanks for checking it out and I hope you enjoy the beating!
